count.@comment: Number of data records supporting the age prediction.

country_id.@comment: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used for prediction scoping.

error.@comment: Human-readable error message from the API.

AgePrediction.@comment: A prediction of a person's age derived from their first name.

ErrorResponse.@comment: An error response from the Agify API.

@graph.schema:name: Demografix ApS
@graph.schema:description: Danish company providing name-based demographic prediction APIs: Agify.io (age), Genderize.io (gender), and Nationalize.io (nationality).

@graph.schema:name: Agify Age Prediction API
@graph.schema:description: REST API that predicts the age of a person from their first name using statistical data from over 900 million records spanning 195+ countries.

schema:offers.schema:name: Free Tier
schema:offers.schema:description: 2,500 name lookups per month at no cost.
